autobooks.REGISTRATION_BOOK: The user fills out the registration form and successfully creates a new account.
autobooks.LOGIN_BOOK: The user fills out the login form and logs in successfully.
autobooks.LOGOUT_BOOK: The user logs out of the platform after logging in.
autobooks.BOOK_DETAIL: The user explicitly requests to navigate to or go to the details page of a specific book that meets certain criteria,
autobooks.SHARE_BOOK: The user explicitly requests to share a specific book that meets certain criteria,
autobooks.OPEN_PREVIEW: The user explicitly requests to open preview of a specific book that meets certain criteria,
autobooks.ADD_TO_READING_LIST: The user explicitly requests to add a specific book to list book that meets certain criteria,
autobooks.REMOVE_FROM_READING_LIST: The user explicitly requests to remove a specific book from reading list that meets certain criteria.
autobooks.SEARCH_BOOK: The user searches for a book using a query.
autobooks.ADD_BOOK: The user adds a new book to the system, specifying details such as name, author, year, genres, page_count
autobooks.EDIT_BOOK: The user edits an existing book, modifying one or more attributes such as author, year, genres, rating, or page_count.
autobooks.DELETE_BOOK: The user deletes a book from the system.
autobooks.CONTACT_BOOK: The user navigates to the contact form page, fills out fields, and submits the form successfully.
autobooks.EDIT_USER_BOOK: The user edits their profile, modifying one or more attributes such as first name, last name, bio, location, website, or favorite genres. Username and email cannot be edited.
autobooks.FILTER_BOOK: The user applies filters to search for books by genre and/or year. Includes Filter in the prompt
autobooks.ADD_COMMENT_BOOK: The user adds a comment to a book.
autobooks.SHOPPING_CART: The user interacts with the shopping cart by adding, removing, or viewing items.
autobooks.VIEW_CART_BOOK: The user views the shopping cart to see items added.
autobooks.ADD_TO_CART_BOOK: The user adds a book to the shopping cart.
autobooks.REMOVE_FROM_CART_BOOK: The user removes a book from the shopping cart.
autobooks.PURCHASE_BOOK: The user completes a purchase of items in the shopping cart.

autocalendar.SELECT_MONTH: Triggered when the user switches to the month view in the calendar.
autocalendar.SELECT_WEEK: Triggered when the user switches to the week view in the calendar.
autocalendar.SELECT_FIVE_DAYS: Triggered when the user switches to the 5-day view in the calendar.
autocalendar.SELECT_DAY: User switches to the day view in the calendar.
autocalendar.SELECT_TODAY: Triggered when the user jumps to today's date in the calendar.
autocalendar.ADD_NEW_CALENDAR: Triggered when the user opens the modal to add a new calendar.
autocalendar.CREATE_CALENDAR: Triggered when the user completes creation of a new calendar with details.
autocalendar.UNSELECT_CALENDAR: Triggered when the user deselects a calendar from the sidebar.
autocalendar.SELECT_CALENDAR: Triggered when the user deselects a calendar from the sidebar.
autocalendar.ADD_EVENT: Triggered when the user creates a new event in the calendar.
autocalendar.CELL_CLICKED: Triggered when the user clicks on a specific date or time cell in the calendar.
autocalendar.CANCEL_ADD_EVENT: Triggered when the user cancels adding a new event.
autocalendar.DELETE_ADDED_EVENT: Triggered when the user deletes an existing calendar event.
autocalendar.EVENT_WIZARD_OPEN: Triggered when the user opens the event creation or editing wizard.
autocalendar.SEARCH_SUBMIT: Triggered when the user submits a search query.
autocalendar.EVENT_ADD_REMINDER: Triggered when a reminder is added to an event.
autocalendar.EVENT_REMOVE_REMINDER: Triggered when a reminder is removed from an event.
autocalendar.EVENT_ADD_ATTENDEE: Triggered when an attendee is added to an event.
autocalendar.EVENT_REMOVE_ATTENDEE: Triggered when an attendee is removed from an event.

autocinema.REGISTRATION: The user fills out the registration form and successfully creates a new account.
autocinema.LOGIN: The user fills out the login form and logs in successfully.
autocinema.LOGOUT: The user logs out of the platform after logging in.
autocinema.FILM_DETAIL: The user explicitly requests to navigate to or go to the details page of a specific movie that meets certain criteria, where they can view information including director, year, genres, rating, duration, and cast.
autocinema.ADD_TO_WATCHLIST: The user explicitly requests to add a film into wishlist of a specific movie that meets certain criteria, where they can view information including director, year, genres, rating, duration, and cast.
autocinema.REMOVE_FROM_WATCHLIST: Remove a film from the watchlist using the provided constraints (used to validate removal events).
autocinema.SHARE_MOVIE: The user requests to share a specific movie that meets certain criteria, where they can view information including director, year, genres, rating, duration, and cast.
autocinema.WATCH_TRAILER: The user requests to watch the trailer of a specific movie that meets certain criteria, where they can view information including director, year, genres, rating, duration, and cast.
autocinema.SEARCH_FILM: The user searches for a film using a query.
autocinema.ADD_FILM: The user adds a new film to the system, specifying details such as name, director, year, genres, duration, language, and cast.
autocinema.EDIT_FILM: The user edits an existing film, modifying one or more attributes such as name, director, year, genres, rating, duration, or cast.
autocinema.DELETE_FILM: The user deletes a film from the system.
autocinema.CONTACT: The user navigates to the contact form page, fills out fields, and submits the form successfully.
autocinema.EDIT_USER: The user edits their profile, modifying one or more attributes such as first name, last name, bio, location, website, or favorite genres. Username and email cannot be edited.
autocinema.FILTER_FILM: The user applies filters to search for films by genre and/or year. Includes Filter in the prompt
autocinema.ADD_COMMENT: The user adds a comment to a movie.

autoconnect.VIEW_USER_PROFILE: The user views another user's profile.
autoconnect.BACK_TO_ALL_JOBS: The user navigates back to the main jobs list.
autoconnect.CONNECT_WITH_USER: The user sends a connection request to another user.
autoconnect.POST_STATUS: The user posts a new status update.
autoconnect.COMMENT_ON_POST: The user comments on a post.
autoconnect.APPLY_FOR_JOB: The user applies for a job.
autoconnect.SEARCH_USERS: The user searches for other users.
autoconnect.FOLLOW_PAGE: The user follows a company page.
autoconnect.UNFOLLOW_PAGE: The user unfollows a company page.
autoconnect.FILTER_JOBS: The user applies filters to job listings.
autoconnect.VIEW_JOB: The user views a job posting in detail.
autoconnect.HOME_NAVBAR: The user opens the Home tab from the navbar.
autoconnect.JOBS_NAVBAR: The user opens the Jobs tab via the navbar.
autoconnect.SAVE_POST: The user saves a post to view later.
autoconnect.HIDE_POST: The user hides a post from their feed.
autoconnect.VIEW_SAVED_POSTS: The user views their saved posts list.
autoconnect.VIEW_APPLIED_JOBS: The user views jobs they have applied to.
autoconnect.CANCEL_APPLICATION: The user cancels a job application.
autoconnect.EDIT_PROFILE: The user edits their profile information.
autoconnect.EDIT_EXPERIENCE: The user edits or adds job experience entries.
autoconnect.ADD_EXPERIENCE: The user adds a new experience entry to their profile.
autoconnect.REMOVE_POST: The user removes a post from a list (e.g., saved items).
autoconnect.UNHIDE_POST: The user restores a previously hidden post.

autocrm.VIEW_MATTER_DETAILS: The user views the detail of different matters
autocrm.SEARCH_MATTER: The user searches for matters using a query string.
autocrm.ADD_NEW_MATTER: The user adds a new matter, specifying details such as matter name, client name and status of matter
autocrm.FILTER_MATTER_STATUS: The user filters matters by status.
autocrm.SORT_MATTER_BY_CREATED_AT: The user sorts matters by created date in ascending and descending order direction.
autocrm.UPDATE_MATTER: The user updates an existing matter.
autocrm.VIEW_CLIENT_DETAILS: The user views the detail of different clients
autocrm.SEARCH_CLIENT: The user searches for clients using a query string.
autocrm.DOCUMENT_DELETED: The user deletes an existing document.
autocrm.DOCUMENT_RENAMED: The user renames an existing document.
autocrm.NEW_CALENDAR_EVENT_ADDED: The user adds a new event to the calendar.
autocrm.VIEW_PENDING_EVENTS: The user views pending calendar events.
autocrm.NEW_LOG_ADDED: The user adds a new time log entry.
autocrm.LOG_EDITED: The user edits an existing time log entry.
autocrm.LOG_DELETE: The user deletes an existing time log entry.
autocrm.BILLING_SEARCH: Search or filter billing entries by text or date range.
autocrm.CHANGE_USER_NAME: The user changes their name in the application.
autocrm.ADD_CLIENT: The user adds a new client record.
autocrm.DELETE_CLIENT: The user deletes a client record.
autocrm.FILTER_CLIENTS: Filter clients by status, matter count, or search text.
autocrm.HELP_VIEWED: The user opens the help/FAQ page.

autodelivery.SEARCH_DELIVERY_RESTAURANT: The user searches for restaurants using a query string.
autodelivery.VIEW_DELIVERY_RESTAURANT: The user views the details of a restaurant.
autodelivery.RESTAURANT_FILTER: The user filters restaurants by search, cuisine, or rating.
autodelivery.VIEW_ALL_RESTAURANTS: The user opens the full list of restaurants from any detail view.
autodelivery.ADD_TO_CART_MODAL_OPEN: The user opens the add-to-cart modal for a menu item.
autodelivery.ITEM_INCREMENTED: The user increases the quantity of a menu item in the cart.
autodelivery.ADD_TO_CART_MENU_ITEM: The user adds a menu item to the cart.
autodelivery.EDIT_CART_ITEM: The user edits an existing cart item (size, preferences, or quantity).
autodelivery.QUICK_ORDER_STARTED: The user starts a quick order from the quick order modal.
autodelivery.QUICK_REORDER: The user reorders a recently ordered item.
autodelivery.OPEN_CHECKOUT_PAGE: The user opens the checkout page to review their order.
autodelivery.DROPOFF_PREFERENCE: The user sets a dropoff preference for delivery.
autodelivery.PLACE_ORDER: The user places an order with delivery or pickup details.
autodelivery.EMPTY_CART: The user empties their cart after adding an item in cart.
autodelivery.DELETE_REVIEW: The user deletes a review they wrote for a restaurant.
autodelivery.BACK_TO_ALL_RESTAURANTS: The user navigates back to the list of all restaurants.
autodelivery.ADDRESS_ADDED: The user adds a new delivery or pickup address.
autodelivery.RESTAURANT_NEXT_PAGE: The user paginates to the next set of restaurants.
autodelivery.RESTAURANT_PREV_PAGE: The user navigates back to the previous set of restaurants.
autodelivery.REVIEW_SUBMITTED: The user submits a new review for a restaurant.
autodelivery.DELIVERY_PRIORITY_SELECTED: The user chooses a delivery priority option.

autodining.DATE_SELECTED: User selects a date from the date picker.
autodining.TIME_SELECTED: User selects a time in the time picker.
autodining.PEOPLE_SELECTED: User selects the number of people/guests.
autodining.SEARCH_RESTAURANT: The user searches for restaurants using a search query.
autodining.TAG_FILTER_SELECTED: User selects or removes a restaurant tag filter.
autodining.LOGOUT: User logs out of their account.
autodining.REVIEW_CREATED: User submits a new restaurant review.
autodining.REVIEW_EDITED: User edits an existing restaurant review.
autodining.VIEW_RESTAURANT: The user explicitly requests to view the details page of a specific restaurant.
autodining.VIEW_FULL_MENU: User requests to view the full menu of a specific restaurant, possibly with booking context.
autodining.COLLAPSE_MENU: User collapses a previously expanded full menu view for a restaurant.
autodining.BOOK_RESTAURANT: User initiates a restaurant table booking with specified details like restaurant name, number of people, date, and time.
autodining.COUNTRY_SELECTED: User selects a country, often as part of filling out contact or payment details for a reservation.
autodining.OCCASION_SELECTED: User selects a special occasion for their restaurant reservation.
autodining.RESERVATION_COMPLETE: User finalizes and completes their restaurant reservation, providing all necessary information.
autodining.SCROLL_VIEW: User scrolls a generic view, list, or page.
autodining.CONTACT_FORM_SUBMIT: User submits the contact form to reach support.
autodining.ABOUT_PAGE_VIEW: User navigates to or interacts with the About page to view company or application information.
autodining.HELP_PAGE_VIEW: User navigates to or interacts with the Help page to find guidance, FAQs, or troubleshooting information.
autodining.ABOUT_FEATURE_CLICK: Triggered when a user clicks a highlighted feature on the About page.
autodining.CONTACT_PAGE_VIEW: Triggered when the Contact page is viewed.
autodining.CONTACT_CARD_CLICK: Triggered when a specific contact card (email/phone/chat) is clicked.
autodining.HELP_CATEGORY_SELECTED: Triggered when a help/support category is selected.
autodining.HELP_FAQ_TOGGLED: Triggered when a FAQ item is expanded or collapsed.

autodiscord.VIEW_SERVERS: The user clicks the Home (servers) icon to view the server list.
autodiscord.VIEW_DMS: The user clicks the Direct Messages icon.
autodiscord.OPEN_SETTINGS: The user opens the Settings page.
autodiscord.SELECT_SERVER: The user selects a server from the server list.
autodiscord.SELECT_CHANNEL: The user selects a channel in the channel list.
autodiscord.SEND_MESSAGE: The user sends a message in a channel.
autodiscord.ADD_REACTION: The user adds a reaction to a message.
autodiscord.SELECT_DM: The user selects a DM conversation.
autodiscord.SEND_DM_MESSAGE: The user sends a message in a direct message conversation.
autodiscord.SETTINGS_APPEARANCE: The user changes the theme (Dark/Light) in Settings.
autodiscord.SETTINGS_NOTIFICATIONS: The user toggles notifications in Settings.
autodiscord.SETTINGS_ACCOUNT: The user saves their display name in Settings.
autodiscord.CREATE_SERVER: The user creates a new server.
autodiscord.OPEN_SERVER_SETTINGS: The user opens server settings (gear next to server name).
autodiscord.DELETE_SERVER: The user deletes a server from server settings.
autodiscord.CREATE_CHANNEL: The user creates a new channel in a server.
autodiscord.JOIN_VOICE_CHANNEL: The user joins a voice channel.
autodiscord.LEAVE_VOICE_CHANNEL: The user leaves the current voice channel.
autodiscord.VOICE_MUTE_TOGGLE: The user toggles mute in the voice channel.

autodrive.ENTER_LOCATION: The user enters a location value (e.g., city, country, or region)
autodrive.ENTER_DESTINATION: The user enters a destination value (e.g., city, country, or region)
autodrive.SEARCH_DESTINATION: The user search a destination value (e.g., city, country, or region)
autodrive.SEARCH_LOCATION: The user searches a location value (e.g., city, country, or region)
autodrive.SELECT_DATE: The user selects a specific date for their trip or booking
autodrive.SELECT_TIME: The user selects a specific time for their trip or booking
autodrive.NEXT_PICKUP: The user clicks the 'Next' button after successfully selecting a pickup date and time.
autodrive.SEARCH: The user clicks on the 'Search' button after selecting pickup, dropoff, and optionally scheduling a ride.
autodrive.SELECT_CAR: The user selects an available car option for their ride, including details such as price, discount, seats, and pickup/dropoff information.
autodrive.RESERVE_RIDE: The user reserves an available car for their ride, including details such as price, discount, seats, and pickup/dropoff information.
autodrive.TRIP_DETAILS: The user views details of a trip, including trip information, ride details, driver information, and location details.
autodrive.CANCEL_RESERVATION: The user cancels a trip reservation, including the trip ID and cancellation reason.

autohealth.OPEN_APPOINTMENT_FORM: The user opened the appointment booking form (clicked Book Appointment on an appointment row).
autohealth.APPOINTMENT_BOOKED_SUCCESSFULLY: The user successfully booked an appointment with a doctor including patient details, insurance, and visit reason.
autohealth.REQUEST_QUICK_APPOINTMENT: The user submitted the homepage quick appointment form (hero); a popup confirms 'We will contact you as soon as possible'.
autohealth.SEARCH_APPOINTMENT: The user clicked Search on the Appointments page to apply doctor, speciality, or date filters.
autohealth.SEARCH_DOCTORS: The user clicked Search on the Doctors page to apply name, speciality, and/or language filters.
autohealth.SEARCH_PRESCRIPTION: The user clicked Search on the Prescriptions page to apply medicine and/or doctor filters.
autohealth.REFILL_PRESCRIPTION: The user requested a prescription refill for a specific medicine.
autohealth.VIEW_PRESCRIPTION: The user viewed a prescription containing doctor information, medicine details, dosage, and start date.
autohealth.SEARCH_MEDICAL_ANALYSIS: The user clicked Search on the Medical Records page to apply title and/or doctor filters.
autohealth.VIEW_MEDICAL_ANALYSIS: The user viewed a medical analysis (clicked View Analysis on a card).
autohealth.VIEW_DOCTOR_PROFILE: The user viewed a doctor's profile, including name, rating, speciality, consultation fee, and languages.
autohealth.VIEW_DOCTOR_EDUCATION: The user viewed a doctor's Education & Certifications tab on the doctor profile page.
autohealth.VIEW_DOCTOR_AVAILABILITY: The user viewed a doctor's Availability tab on the doctor profile page.
autohealth.OPEN_CONTACT_DOCTOR_FORM: The user opened the contact doctor form (clicked Contact Doctor button on a doctor profile).
autohealth.CONTACT_DOCTOR: The user wants to contact a doctor based on their name, speciality, or rating.
autohealth.DOCTOR_CONTACTED_SUCCESSFULLY: The user has successfully contacted a doctor, providing personal details, contact preferences, and message context.
autohealth.FILTER_DOCTOR_REVIEWS: The user filtered or sorted a doctor's reviews (by star rating and/or sort order: newest, oldest, highest, lowest).

autolist.AUTOLIST_ADD_TASK_CLICKED: Triggered when the user clicks the button to add a new task.
autolist.AUTOLIST_SELECT_DATE_FOR_TASK: Triggered when the user selects a date for a task.
autolist.AUTOLIST_SELECT_TASK_PRIORITY: Triggered when the user selects a priority for a task.
autolist.AUTOLIST_TASK_ADDED: Triggered when a task is added or updated.
autolist.AUTOLIST_CANCEL_TASK_CREATION: Triggered when the user cancels task creation.
autolist.AUTOLIST_EDIT_TASK_MODAL_OPENED: Triggered when the edit task modal is opened.
autolist.AUTOLIST_COMPLETE_TASK: Triggered when a task is marked as complete.
autolist.AUTOLIST_DELETE_TASK: Triggered when a task is deleted.
autolist.AUTOLIST_ADD_TEAM_CLICKED: Triggered when the user clicks the button to add a new team.
autolist.AUTOLIST_TEAM_MEMBERS_ADDED: Triggered when team members are added.
autolist.AUTOLIST_TEAM_ROLE_ASSIGNED: Triggered when a role is assigned to a team member.
autolist.AUTOLIST_TEAM_CREATED: Triggered when a team is created.

autolodge.SEARCH_HOTEL: The user searches for hotels with optional filters like location, dates, and guest composition.
autolodge.VIEW_HOTEL: Triggered when the user views a specific hotel listing with detailed information.
autolodge.ADD_TO_WISHLIST: Triggered when the user adds a hotel listing to their wishlist.
autolodge.REMOVE_FROM_WISHLIST: Triggered when the user removes a hotel listing from their wishlist.
autolodge.SHARE_HOTEL: Triggered when the user shares a hotel listing with someone, typically via email.
autolodge.EDIT_NUMBER_OF_GUESTS: Triggered when the user edits the number of guests to a specific value.
autolodge.RESERVE_HOTEL: Triggered when the user confirms a reservation or booking for a hotel.
autolodge.EDIT_CHECK_IN_OUT_DATES: Triggered when a user edits the check-in or check-out dates of a reservation or search.
autolodge.CONFIRM_AND_PAY: Triggered when the user confirms booking details and initiates payment.
autolodge.MESSAGE_HOST: Triggered when the user sends a message to the host.
autolodge.BACK_TO_ALL_HOTELS: Triggered when the user goes back to the main hotels dashboard.
autolodge.SUBMIT_REVIEW: Triggered when the user submits a hotel review and rating.
autolodge.APPLY_FILTERS: User applies filters like rating, price cap, and region on the hotel list.
autolodge.PAYMENT_METHOD_SELECTED: User chooses a payment method during checkout.
autolodge.WISHLIST_OPENED: User opens the wishlist to view saved hotels.
autolodge.BOOK_FROM_WISHLIST: User initiates booking from a wishlist item.
autolodge.POPULAR_HOTELS_VIEWED: User views the popular hotels page (rating >= 4.5).
autolodge.FAQ_OPENED: User expands a specific FAQ item.

automail.VIEW_EMAIL: The user selects an email to view and read its contents.
automail.STAR_AN_EMAIL: The user stars or unstar, marks or unmarks an email as important visually using the star icon.
automail.MARK_EMAIL_AS_IMPORTANT: The user flags an email as important or gives it high priority.
automail.MARK_AS_UNREAD: The user marks an already read email as unread.
automail.DELETE_EMAIL: The user deletes an email, sending it to the trash or bin.
automail.MARK_AS_SPAM: The user flags an email as spam or junk to move it out of the inbox.
automail.ADD_LABEL: The user adds a label to an email to categorize or organize it.
automail.CREATE_LABEL: The user creates a new label with a specific name and optional color.
automail.SEND_EMAIL: The user sends an email that has been composed, with the provided recipient, subject, and/or body.
automail.EMAIL_SAVE_AS_DRAFT: The user saves a composed email as a draft without sending it.
automail.EDIT_DRAFT_EMAIL: The user opens and edits an existing draft email.
automail.ARCHIVE_EMAIL: The user archives an email to remove it from the inbox.
automail.REPLY_EMAIL: The user replies to an email.
automail.FORWARD_EMAIL: The user forwards an email to new recipients.
automail.THEME_CHANGED: The user changes the application theme (e.g., dark, light, system default).
automail.SEARCH_EMAIL: The user performs a search query to locate emails based on specific keywords, sender, subject, or label.
automail.CLEAR_SELECTION: The user clears all selected emails.
automail.EMAILS_NEXT_PAGE: The user paginates to the next set of emails.
automail.EMAILS_PREV_PAGE: The user paginates back to the previous set of emails.
automail.VIEW_TEMPLATES: The user opens the email templates section.
automail.TEMPLATE_SELECTED: The user chooses a specific email template to work with.
automail.TEMPLATE_BODY_EDITED: The user edits the body of a selected template.
automail.TEMPLATE_SENT: The user sends an email from a template.
automail.TEMPLATE_SAVED_DRAFT: The user saves an email template as a draft.
automail.TEMPLATE_CANCELED: The user cancels working on a template and resets changes.

autostats.VIEW_SUBNET: The user viewed a subnet detail page (subnet name, emission, price, market cap, volume).
autostats.VIEW_VALIDATOR: The user viewed a validator detail page (hotkey, rank, dominance, stake, commission).
autostats.VIEW_BLOCK: The user viewed a block detail page (block number, hash, validator, epoch, extrinsics, events).
autostats.VIEW_ACCOUNT: The user viewed an account detail page (address, balance, staked amount, account type).
autostats.EXECUTE_BUY: The user confirmed a market or limit buy order (amount TAU, amount Alpha, price impact).
autostats.EXECUTE_SELL: The user confirmed a market or limit sell order (amount TAU, amount Alpha, max delegated Alpha).
autostats.CONNECT_WALLET: The user connected a wallet (Polkadot.js, Talisman, or SubWallet).
autostats.DISCONNECT_WALLET: The user disconnected the connected wallet.
autostats.TRANSFER_COMPLETE: The user completed a transfer (sent amount to an address).
autostats.FAVORITE_SUBNET: The user added a subnet to favorites from the subnet detail page.

autowork.BOOK_A_CONSULTATION: The user initiate the booking process for a consultation
autowork.HIRE_BTN_CLICKED: The user clicked hire button to start hiring a consultation workflow
autowork.SELECT_HIRING_TEAM: The user select the hiring team
autowork.HIRE_LATER: The user opts to hire later instead of starting hiring now.
autowork.HIRE_LATER_REMOVED: The user remove the expert who is in hire later page.
autowork.HIRE_LATER_START: The user start hiring the expert who is in hire later page.
autowork.QUICK_HIRE: The user triggers quick hire directly from expert information.
autowork.HIRE_CONSULTANT: The user confirm hiring of a chosen consultation
autowork.CANCEL_HIRE: The user cancel hiring of a chosen consultation
autowork.WRITE_JOB_TITLE: The user writes a title of job
autowork.CHOOSE_BUDGET_TYPE: The user selects a budget type for the job.
autowork.CHOOSE_PROJECT_SIZE: The user chooses the project size.
autowork.CHOOSE_PROJECT_TIMELINE: The user chooses expected project timeline.
autowork.SET_RATE_RANGE: The user sets the hourly rate range.
autowork.WRITE_JOB_DESCRIPTION: The user writes the job description.
autowork.CLOSE_POST_A_JOB_WINDOW: The user closes the posting of job window
autowork.NAVBAR_JOBS_CLICK: The user click a jobs from navbar option.
autowork.NAVBAR_HIRES_CLICK: The user click a hires from navbar option.
autowork.NAVBAR_EXPERTS_CLICK: The user click a  from navbar option.
autowork.NAVBAR_FAVORITES_CLICK: The user click favorite from navbar option.
autowork.NAVBAR_HIRE_LATER_CLICK: The user click a hire later from navbar option.
autowork.NAVBAR_PROFILE_CLICK: The user click a profile from navbar option.
autowork.CONTACT_EXPERT_OPENED: The user click a contact for contacting with expert.
autowork.CONTACT_EXPERT_MESSAGE_SENT: The user sends a message to an expert after opening the contact expert flow.
autowork.EDIT_PROFILE_NAME: The user edits and updates their profile name.
autowork.EDIT_PROFILE_TITLE: The user edits and updates their profile title.
autowork.EDIT_PROFILE_LOCATION: The user edits and updates their profile location.
autowork.EDIT_ABOUT: The user edits and updates their profile 'About' or description section.
autowork.EDIT_PROFILE_EMAIL: The user edits and updates their profile email address.
autowork.BROWSE_FAVORITE_EXPERT: The user edits and updates their profile email address.
autowork.FAVORITE_EXPERT_SELECTED: The user selects an expert to mark them as favorite.
autowork.FAVORITE_EXPERT_REMOVED: The user removes an expert from their favorites.

autozone.VIEW_DETAIL: The user explicitly requests to view the details page of a specific product that meets certain criteria.
autozone.DETAILS_TOGGLE: The user toggles a collapsible section inside a product detail page.
autozone.SEARCH_PRODUCT: The user searches for products using a search query.
autozone.CATEGORY_FILTER: The user changes or applies category filters while browsing/searching products.
autozone.ADD_TO_CART: The user adds items to their shopping cart.
autozone.ADD_TO_WISHLIST: The user adds, removes, or clears items from their wishlist.
autozone.SHARE_PRODUCT: The user shares or copies the link to a specific product.
autozone.VIEW_CART: The user views the contents of their shopping cart.
autozone.VIEW_WISHLIST: The user views their saved wishlist items or expands the wishlist preview.
autozone.CHECKOUT_STARTED: The user initiates the checkout process by clicking on Buy now.
autozone.PROCEED_TO_CHECKOUT: The user proceeds from cart to checkout with selected items.
autozone.QUANTITY_CHANGED: The user changes the quantity of an item in their shopping cart.
autozone.CAROUSEL_SCROLL: The user scrolls through a product carousel.
